label: Thursday, March 26
one_thing: Fix Zapier + Call Tom — both unlock everything downstream

tasks.text: Call Tom — make the part-time offer
tasks.note: Part-time contract (~20hrs, 8 DCs/month MPS). Get him shadowing Rye before Perth. Comp models: /workspace/reference/dc-comp-parttime-final.pdf
7+ Zaps down. Stripe cancel sync broken = phantom active counts. 10 min fix in Zapier settings → reconnect HubSpot.
Best ad by ROAS (5.1x). Every day off = ~$350 missed revenue. Quick toggle in Meta Ads Manager.
Recovery email went to 1,895 leads yesterday. Check Stripe for $111 deposits. If 2%+ convert, this becomes the permanent funnel.
Bali window = best time for face-to-face. Frame: trust & investment, not pressure. 'Double the time = more than double the output.'
FE-0005 invoice sent. $5,489 ($4,990 + GST). Check bank: BSB 086-495 / Acc 31-904-6705
